name: Covista Inc.
business: Adtalem Global Education Inc. is a healthcare educator that operates five institutions offering degree and certificate programs in nursing, medicine, veterinary medicine, and other health professions. The company sells educational services to students, primarily in the U.S. and international locations, with a focus on preparing a diverse talent workforce for the healthcare industry.

exposures.sentence: Adtalem is the leading healthcare educator in the U.S. and a systemically important solution for preparing a diverse talent workforce that meets the needs of the healthcare industry.
